scripts.prebuild:customer:android: npm --prefix apps/customer-app exec -- expo prebuild --platform android
scripts.prebuild:worker:android: npm --prefix apps/worker-app exec -- expo prebuild --platform android
scripts.verify:worker: npm run lint:worker && npm run typecheck:worker
scripts.verify:customer: npm run lint:customer && npm run typecheck:customer
scripts.verify:all: npm run lint:repo && npm run typecheck:worker && npm run typecheck:customer
